home.heroBody: [AR] Brand strategy, identity, content, and 3D visuals that convert.
home.projectsTitle: [AR] Same motion system, now wrapped in the Creative visual language.
home.projectsBody: [AR] The layout stays editorial and kinetic, but the surfaces, color temperature, and typography now follow the softer premium theme from the reference site.

product.title: [AR] A booster rocket for digital product teams
product.body: [AR] We collaborate with startups and product departments around the world to invent and reinvent the products of tomorrow.

productPage.contactBody: [AR] We are always up for meeting new teams. If you have a product in motion, a concept that needs shape, or a launch that needs sharper direction, let's talk.
productPage.managingPartnerTitle: [AR] Managing Partner and Head of Products

projectDetail.colorStoryBody: [AR] The carefully curated palette that brings the digital experience to life.
projectDetail.projectImpactBody: [AR] Key outcomes that define the project's success and lasting value.

quote.dialogDescription: [AR] Multi-step project brief builder used to prepare a quote request.
quote.headerIntro: [AR] Shape a project brief in four short steps. On submit, we open a prefilled email draft to `newbusiness@hellomonday.com`.
quote.step01Description: [AR] Choose the outcomes you want this quote to support.
quote.step02Description: [AR] Define the service lanes and outputs you expect.
quote.step03Description: [AR] Set your expected schedule and investment range.
quote.step04Description: [AR] Tell us where to send the quote and follow-up.
quote.goalFocusBody: [AR] Select one or more outcomes for this project.
quote.projectContextBody: [AR] Share the audience, challenge, or launch context behind the request.
quote.projectContextPlaceholder: [AR] We need a premium launch site for a new product line...
quote.servicesBody: [AR] Choose the service lanes you want included in the quote.
quote.deliverablesBody: [AR] Select the outputs you expect from this engagement.
quote.timelineBody: [AR] Pick the rough delivery window you have in mind.
quote.budgetBody: [AR] Optional, but useful for keeping the proposal realistic.
quote.budgetPlaceholder: [AR] Launch dates, constraints, markets, or extra notes...
quote.contactDetailsBody: [AR] We will prefill an email draft so your team can review it before sending.
quote.successMessage: [AR] Email draft opened. The brief was also copied to your clipboard.
quote.discardConfirm: [AR] Are you sure you want to close? Your quote request progress will be lost.
